title: limonium cofrentanum
intro: Limonium cofrentanum, also known as Spanish statice, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Limonium cofrentanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, teas, and topical creams, often used to treat skin irritations, burns, and minor cuts.
